title: OAuth
description: Adds the ability to login and authenticate to Microsoft, Mojang, or Legacy accounts!
body:
This mod adds a way to login within your game in the multiplayer screen. 
After, it will ask the login type. If you select Microsoft it'll open in
 your default browser so you can securely login. Otherwise click Mojang 
login to login with your username/email just like you would in the 
normal Minecraft launcher. If you leave the password field blank you can
 login offline with any username you want! This only works on offline 
servers or in singleplayer however. Features:Supports Legacy, Mojang, and Microsoft account logins.Adds a new button to the multiplayer screen to login and fix invalid sessions.Allows you to login to different accounts without closing your game.Ability to set your username for playing offline by leaving the password field blank.Mod only needs to be installed on the client to work.  

#### Features

 - Supports Legacy, Mojang, and Microsoft account logins.
 - Adds a new button to the multiplayer screen to login and fix invalid sessions.
 - Allows you to login to different accounts without closing your game.
 - Ability to set your username for playing offline by leaving the password field blank.
 - Mod only needs to be installed on the client to work.
 
------------
